payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Narrow, low-pile brown-orange rectangular rug or runner with a flatwoven, wood-grain-like linear pattern and darker longitudinal bands; visible area is edge-cropped (partial) and shows slight wear/scuffing; appears close to the camera at roughly 0.5 m distance.
